_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: maciejmajek
data.message:
feat: human robot interface (#88)

* feat: documents loader

* feat: enhance typing, drop logging

* feat: talk to docs app

* build: update deps

* style: remove tools.py:138:59: E203 whitespace before ':'

* build: add parser dependencies

* feat: use StateGraph instead of Graph

* feat: implement rai-tts node (#83)

* feat: implement rai-tts node

* refactor: allow empty elevenlabs api key

* chore: remove poetry lock

* feat: asr node (#48)

* feat: added asr node

* build: added sounddevice to poetry

* feat: added publishing string transcription messages by a topic

* feat: model and language as input parameters

* feat: parametrize node, add launch file

* refactor: rename asr package into rai_asr

* test: remove default tests

* chore: update package.xml, minor changes

* build: update pyproject, add docs for deps that cant be installed using rosdep

* chore: update description and license in setup.py

* Update base docs

* docs: add node readme, add portaudio to deps

* refactor: replace poratudio2 with portaudio19-dev

* feat: add status topic

* chore: remove poetry lock

---------

Co-authored-by: maciejmajek <maciej.majek@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Maciej Majek <46171033+maciejmajek@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: rachwalk <kajetan.rachwal@robotec.ai>

* feat: add proof-of-concept HMI node (#85)

* feat: add an initial implementation for the HMI node

* chore: add missing files to make rai_hmi into a ROS2 package

* docs: add README.md for rai_hmi package

* chore: add comments describing the logic in handle_human_message

* chore: fix code formatting with pre-commit script

* fix: fix typo in topic name

* fix: apply changes from review

* chore: replace single quotes with double quotes

---------

Co-authored-by: Maciej Majek <46171033+maciejmajek@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: add poetry.lock

* feat: add rai_bringup package, align topic names

* feat: parametrize hri launch file

* feat: vector store retrieval for rai_whoami

* feat: identity service for rai_whoami

* feat: request constitution and identity in rai_hmi node

* feat: add documentation access to the hmi node

* chore: rename identity to robot_identity.txt

* feat: add vector database and robot identity to husarion_whoami, update load_docs script

* fix: load docs path, identity path

* refactor: move load docs to rai_cli

* feat: add configuration package parameter to hmi

* fix: change elevenlabs voice

* feat: add asr latch mechanism

* fix: load model once

* refactor: use openai cloud based whisper

* refactor: asr lock

* style: clean up asr node

* fix: final touch

* docs: add information on creating robot's whoami

* docs: add RAI_bringup info (hri)

* Fixed resuming recording after receiving empty message

Signed-off-by: Wiktoria Siekierska <wiktoria.siekierska@robotec.ai>

---------

Signed-off-by: Wiktoria Siekierska <wiktoria.siekierska@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Magdalena Kotynia <magdalena.kotynia@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: rachwalk <kajetan.rachwal@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Adam Gotlib <adam.gotlib@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Wiktoria Siekierska <wiktoria.siekierska@robotec.ai>

+)

   find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)

+string[] documents

data.author: rachwalk
data.message:
feat: add grouding dino ros2 node (#81)

* Initial commit adding interfaces and grounding dino

* Update gitignore to include ros build dirs

* Create README with installation instructions, reproducible install

* Add launch files, finalise readme

* pre-commit format

* Remove unnecessary tests

* Remove weights from .gitignore

* Add grounding dino as poetry dependency

* Update package README

* Update base docs

* Add missing dependancy to docs

* Remove venv from .gitignore

* Formatting

* Add vision_msgs as dependency

* Fix typos

* Add automatic download of weights

* Add README

* Update README.md

* prettier

* fix build

* update docs with pythonpath modification

* Update src/rai_grounding_dino/README.md

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update src/rai_interfaces/package.xml

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update src/rai_interfaces/package.xml

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update src/rai_interfaces/package.xml

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

* rm redundant file

* add rosidl_generator to package xml for interfaces

---------

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,10 +11,16 @@ find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
 # further dependencies manually.
 # find_package(<dependency> REQUIRED)
 
+find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(vision_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(sensor_msgs REQUIRED)
 find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)
 
 rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
   "srv/VectorStoreRetrieval.srv"
+  "msg/RAIDetectionArray.msg"
+  "srv/RAIGroundingDino.srv"
+  DEPENDENCIES std_msgs vision_msgs sensor_msgs
 )
 
 if(BUILD_TESTING)

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# A list of 2D detections, for a multi-object 2D detector.
+
+std_msgs/Header header
+
+# A list of the detected proposals. A multi-proposal detector might generate
+#   this list with many candidate detections generated from a single input.
+vision_msgs/Detection2D[] detections
+string[] detection_classes

@@ -4,14 +4,19 @@
   <name>rai_interfaces</name>
   <version>0.1.0</version>
   <description>Interfaces for RAI communication</description>
-  <maintainer email="adam.dabrowski@robotec.ai">Adam Dabrowski</maintainer>
+    <maintainer email="adam.dabrowski@robotec.ai">Adam Dabrowski</maintainer>
+    <maintainer email="kajetan.rachwal@robotec.ai">Kajetan Rachwał</maintainer>
   <license>Apache-2.0</license>
 
-  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+  <depend>std_msgs</depend>
+  <depend>vision_msgs</depend>
+  <depend>sensor_msgs</depend>
 
   <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
   <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
-  <build_depend>rosidl_default_generators</build_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
   <exec_depend>rosidl_default_runtime</exec_depend>
   <member_of_group>rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>
   <export>

data.author: adamdbrw
data.message:
Initial work on whoami package (#70)

* initial work on whoami package

Signed-off-by: Adam Dąbrowski <adam.dabrowski@robotec.ai>

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: pre-commit

* feat: expand typing

* test: skip tests

* test: remove default ros2 rai_whoami tests

* feat(`rai_whoami`): remove default values for ros parameters

---------

Signed-off-by: Adam Dąbrowski <adam.dabrowski@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Maciej Majek <46171033+maciejmajek@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Bartek Boczek <22739059+boczekbartek@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Maciej Majek <maciej.majek@robotec.ai>
Co-authored-by: Bartłomiej Boczek <bartlomiej.boczek@robotec.ai>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(rai_interfaces)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+# uncomment the following section in order to fill in
+# further dependencies manually.
+# find_package(<dependency> REQUIRED)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # comment the line when a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # comment the line when this package is in a git repo and when
+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,202 @@

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>rai_interfaces</name>
+  <version>0.1.0</version>
+  <description>Interfaces for RAI communication</description>
+  <maintainer email="adam.dabrowski@robotec.ai">Adam Dabrowski</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache-2.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>
